IDEs & Editors

JetBrains Suite

IntelliJ IDEA
Popular

The leading IDE for Java and Kotlin development

WebStorm

Powerful JavaScript IDE

PyCharm

Professional Python IDE

GoLand

Dedicated IDE for Go language

CLion

Cross-platform IDE for C/C++

Rider

.NET and Unity game development IDE

DataGrip

Database IDE supporting multiple databases

PhpStorm

Dedicated IDE for PHP development

RubyMine

Ruby and Rails development IDE

RustRover

Dedicated IDE for Rust language

Fleet

Lightweight code editor by JetBrains

VS Code & Derivatives

VS Code
Most Popular

Lightweight code editor by Microsoft with rich plugin ecosystem

Cursor
AI Powered

AI-powered code editor with built-in GPT-4

Trae

ByteDance AI programming IDE with free Claude models

Windsurf

Codeium AI code editor with multi-model support

VSCodium

Open source version of VS Code without Microsoft telemetry

Classic Editors

Sublime Text

Lightweight, fast text editor with extremely quick startup

Vim

Powerful command-line text editor with efficient keyboard operations

Neovim

Modernized Vim fork with better plugin ecosystem

Emacs

Extensible text editor, known as OS disguised as editor

Notepad++

Lightweight code editor for Windows

Zed

High-performance collaborative code editor with real-time editing

Platform IDEs

Xcode

Apple official IDE for iOS/macOS development

Android Studio

Google official Android development IDE

DevEco Studio

Huawei HarmonyOS app development IDE

HBuilderX

Lightweight frontend IDE by DCloud

Programming Languages

Mainstream

JavaScript

Core language for Web development, full-stack capable

TypeScript
Recommended

JavaScript superset with static type system

Python

Simple and elegant multi-purpose language, AI-first choice

Java

Cross-platform enterprise programming language

Go

High-performance programming language by Google

Rust

Safe, concurrent, practical systems programming language

C++

High-performance systems programming language

C#

Modern object-oriented language by Microsoft

Kotlin

Modern JVM language by JetBrains

Swift

Ruby

Simple and elegant dynamic scripting language

PHP

Lua

Frontend Frameworks

Vue Ecosystem

Vue 3
Recommended

Progressive JavaScript framework, easy to learn

Vue 2

Progressive JavaScript framework, classic version

Vue Router

Official Vue.js routing manager

Pinia

Vue official recommended state management library

Nuxt

Vue-based SSR framework with server-side rendering

VueUse

Collection of essential Vue Composition Utilities

Element Plus

Vue 3 based component library

Ant Design Vue

Enterprise-class UI component library

Vant

Lightweight Mobile Vue Component Library

Cube UI

Exquisite mobile component library based on Vue.js

NutUI

JD-style lightweight mobile component library

Vuetify

Material Design Vue component library

React Ecosystem

React

JavaScript library for building user interfaces

React Router

Declarative routing for React

Next.js

React full-stack framework with SSR and SSG support

UmiJS

Pluggable enterprise-level front-end application framework

Ant Design

Enterprise-class React UI component library

Ant Design Mobile

React component library for building mobile web apps

Zustand

Lightweight state management solution

Valtio

Proxy-state made simple for React and Vanilla

Jotai

Primitive and flexible state management for React

Redux

State container for JavaScript applications

MobX

Simple, scalable state management

ahooks

High-quality and reliable React Hooks library

MUI

Material Design React component library

Chakra UI

Modular React component library

SolidJS

Preact

Sass

CSS extension language, most powerful preprocessor

Less

Backwards compatible CSS extension

Stylus

Expressive CSS preprocessor

PostCSS

Bundlers

Vite
Recommended

Rollup

esbuild

Turbopack

Parcel

Bun
